name: autocoder
description: Autonomous GitHub issue resolution workflows for Codex, including fix loops, worker coordination, proposal handling, and validation-oriented issue triage.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomous GitHub issue workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Autocoder to triage issues, run fix loops, review blocked work, improve coverage, and coordinate parallel worker sessions from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Triage GitHub issues, run fix loops, review blocked work, and coordinate autonomous coding workflows
